display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
set_idx = addr[ OFF_W+IDX_W-1 : OFF_W ]
tag_in = addr[ ADDR_W-1 : OFF_W+IDX_W ]

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
TAG_SRAM
N_SETS × N_WAYS × TAG_W
SRAM dual-port

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SDM_TYPE_ROM
N_SETS × 2 bits
ROM — escrita única no reset
00=follower · 01=SRRIP · 10=BRRIP

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BIP_CNT_REG
N_SETS × BIP_W bits
Contador por conjunto
reset → 0

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PSEL_REG
1 × PSEL_W bits
Contador saturante global
reset → 0 (SRRIP vence)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Para cada way w ∈ [0..N_WAYS-1]:
hit_vec[w] = valid_rd[w] AND (tag_rd[w] == tag_in)
─────────────────────────────────────────────
hit_any = OR_REDUCE(hit_vec)
hit_way = PriorityEncode(hit_vec) → WAY_W bits

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MIN_RRPV_TREE
─────────────────────────────
Árvore redutora: min_rrpv = MIN_w(rrpv_rd[w])
delta = MAX_RRPV - min_rrpv (2 bits)
victim_rrpv = first w where rrpv_rd[w]==min_rrpv

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RRPV_DELTA_APPLY
─────────────────────────────
rrpv_aged[w] = MIN(rrpv_rd[w] + delta, MAX_RRPV)
(saturação em 2'b11 — evita overflow)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
sdm_type = SDM_TYPE_ROM[set_idx]
─────────────────────────────────────
sdm_type == 2'b01 → policy = SRRIP
sdm_type == 2'b10 → policy = BRRIP
sdm_type == 2'b00 → policy = psel[PSEL_W-1]
(0=SRRIP / 1=BRRIP)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
bip_cnt_rd = BIP_CNT_REG[set_idx]
bip_cnt_next = bip_cnt_rd + 1 (5 bits, wrap)
─────────────────────────────────────────────
insert_bip = (bip_cnt_next == 0) ? LONG_RRPV (2'b10)
: MAX_RRPV (2'b11)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
policy == SRRIP
→ insert_rrpv = 2'b10 (LONG)
policy == BRRIP
→ insert_rrpv = insert_bip

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
sdm_type == 2'b01 (SRRIP-SDM) AND miss:
psel_next = (psel == PSEL_MAX) ? PSEL_MAX : psel + 1
sdm_type == 2'b10 (BRRIP-SDM) AND miss:
psel_next = (psel == 0) ? 0 : psel - 1
sdm_type == 2'b00 (follower):
psel_next = psel (sem mudança)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EM HIT:
RRPV_REG[set][hit_way] ← 2'b00 (HP: hit promotion)
EM MISS (sem inválido):
RRPV_REG[set][*] ← rrpv_aged[*] (com delta)
RRPV_REG[set][victim] ← insert_rrpv
TAG_SRAM[set][victim] ← tag_in
VALID_REG[set][victim] ← 1
EM MISS (com inválido):
RRPV_REG[set][inv_way] ← insert_rrpv
TAG_SRAM[set][inv_way] ← tag_in
VALID_REG[set][inv_way] ← 1
SEMPRE EM MISS:
BIP_CNT_REG[set] ← bip_cnt_next (se política==BRRIP)
PSEL_REG ← psel_next (se SDM set)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 12px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
IDLE ──(valid_req)──▶ TAG_CMP ──(1 ciclo)──▶ UPDATE ──▶ IDLE
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
IDLE : rd_en=0 we=0 stall=0
TAG_CMP: rd_en=1 we=0 stall=1
UPDATE : rd_en=0 we=1 stall=0
